cpSection: Film Quality and Manufacturing Processes Course 1.0

lessons.title: Radiation Interaction and Math Review
objectives: Review the interaction of radiation with matter at Level II depth
Refresh the mathematical skills required for technique development
cp105Topics: FQ 1.1 Interaction of radiation with matter

lessons.title: Exposure Calculations and Geometric Principles Review
objectives: Solve multi-step exposure calculations involving source changes, distance, and density
Apply geometric exposure principles to minimize unsharpness and distortion

lessons.title: Radiographic Image Quality Parameters Review
objectives: Relate density, contrast, definition, and sensitivity to technique variables
Evaluate how image quality parameters interact when optimizing a technique
